/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/conveyor_sim.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conveyor_sim.dir/src/MachineController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conveyor_sim.dir/src/Conveyor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conveyor_sim.dir/src/Sensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conveyor_sim.dir/src/SorterGate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conveyor_sim.dir/src/AlarmManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conveyor_sim.dir/src/SimulationEngine.cpp.o -o conveyor_sim
